debug Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual debug Directory Reference(3)

NAME

debug Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file atomic.h
Debug tracking for atomic operations. file backtrace.h
📍 Backtrace capture, symbolization, and formatting file memory.h
🔍 Memory debugging helpers for tracking allocations in debug builds file mutex.h
Per-thread mutex lock stack for deadlock detection. file named.h
Named object registry for debugging — log identifiable resource names. file sync.h
🔒 Synchronization primitive debugging (mutexes, rwlocks, condition variables)

Version 0.9.19 ascii-chat
